- CLI no longer re-parses blocked reason strings: [crates/jit/src/main.rs:3543](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-6e7f54a7/crates/jit/src/main.rs:3543) exhaustively matches `BlockingReason`; the prior silent fallback is gone.

**Architecture And Separation**

No new boundary violation found in the reviewed change. Domain typing stays in `domain/queries.rs`; command code orchestrates storage plus document/graph work; CLI parsing for document scope happens in `main.rs`; graph format parsing is delegated to clap via the typed enum requested by the issue.

**Functional Paradigm**

The changed `query_blocked` implementation remains iterator-based at [crates/jit/src/domain/queries.rs:120](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-6e7f54a7/crates/jit/src/domain/queries.rs:120). No concerning new imperative logic was introduced beyond existing command-layer code.

**Correctness And Invariants**

No regression found for the issue’s touched behavior. The typed blocked reason mapping preserves previous output shape by using `Display` for minimal JSON/human output and explicit field formatting for full JSON.

Existing repository-wide direct writes still exist, including graph export output at [crates/jit/src/main.rs:2910](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-6e7f54a7/crates/jit/src/main.rs:2910), but that write predates this commit and was not introduced by this change.

**Safety**

No unsafe code was introduced in the reviewed diff. The workspace-level `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` expectation is not weakened.

No new library `unwrap()`/`expect()` use found in the changed implementation outside tests/docs.

Valid accepted inputs remain unchanged: `doc check-links --scope all|issue:ID`, and `graph export --format dot|mermaid|json`. Invalid graph formats are now rejected by clap parse-time validation via `value_enum`.
